        c = x[:n2].reshape(N,2); r = np.exp(x[n2:])

def _expand_loose(c, r, iters=100):

            walls = min(c[i,0], 1-c[i,0], c[i,1], 1-c[i,1])

            if dmin > r[i] + 1e-12:

    ii, jj = np.triu_indices(N, 1)
    d = np.sqrt(((c[ii]-c[jj])**2).sum(1))
    return np.all(d >= r[ii]+r[jj]-tol)
